DigitalProducts.

At Northhaus, we create clean, simple, and beautifully designed HTML planners that help you stay organised without the overwhelm. Our products are built for people who want practical digital tools that are easy to use, visually clear with no complicated spreadsheets, confusing formulas, or cluttered layouts.

HTMLProducts.

EVERYTHING IN ONE PLACE

Planning a UK wedding means juggling dozens of moving pieces – suppliers, budgets, guests, RSVPs, dates, deposits. This organiser brings it all into one calm, private place that lives on your computer, so you can spend less time on spreadsheets and more time enjoying being engaged.

TURN WORDS INTO WORKOUTS

Fit Phrase transforms phrases into movement – every letter linked to a corresponding exercise, creating quick, engaging workouts you can do anywhere. A simple, playful way to stay active, build consistency, and make fitness feel less like a chore.

KEEP ON TRACK OF MONTHLY COSTS

A simple, well-designed UK Budget Tracker that helps you take control of your monthly finances – track bills, debt and investments in one calm, considered place.
